name: headshot
definition: A head only view of a person (or animal/s) or persons as in a montage.

name: half-length
definition: A torso and head view of a person or persons.

name: full-length
definition: A view from head to toe of a person or persons

name: profile
definition: A view of a person from the side

name: rear view
definition: A view of a person or persons from the rear.

name: single
definition: A view of only one person, object or animal.

name: couple
definition: A view of two people who are in a personal relationship, for example engaged, married or in a romantic partnership.

name: two
definition: A view of two people

name: group
definition: A view of more than two people

name: general view
definition: An overall view of the subject and its surrounds

name: panoramic view
definition: A panoramic or wide angle view of a subject and its surrounds

name: aerial view
definition: A view taken from above

name: under-water
definition: A photo taken under water

name: night scene
definition: A photo taken during darkness

name: satellite
definition: A photo taken from a satellite in orbit

name: exterior view
definition: A photo that shows the exterior of a building or other object

name: interior view
definition: A scene or view of the interior of a building or other object

name: close-up
definition: A view of, or part of a person/object taken at close range in order to emphasize detail or accentuate mood. Macro photography.

name: action
definition: Subject in motion such as children jumping, horse running

name: performing
definition: Subject or subjects on a stage performing to an audience

name: posing
definition: Subject or subjects posing such as a *victory* pose or other stance that symbolizes leadership.

name: symbolic
definition: A posed picture symbolizing an event - two rings for marriage

name: off-beat
definition: An attractive, perhaps fun picture of everyday events - dog with sunglasses, people cooling off in the fountain

name: movie scene
definition: Photos taken during the shooting of a movie or TV production.
